title: Sales and retail assistants
description: Perform duties such as taking orders and serving food and beverages. Serve customers at counter or from a steam table. May take payment. May prepare food and beverages. Prepare or serve specialty coffee or other beverages. Serve food such as baked goods or sandwiches to patrons. Facilitate food service. Clean tables; remove dirty dishes; replace soiled table linens; set tables; replenish supply of clean linens, silverware, glassware, and dishes; supply service bar with food; and serve items such as water, condiments, and coffee to patrons. (Based on 11 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Greet customers and ascertain what each customer wants or needs.
Assist customers by responding to complaints, updating them about orders, and providing product details.
Accept payment from customers and process cash or credit transactions.
Maintain and clean work areas, dining, and kitchen areas, including scrubbing and polishing equipment.
Serve food, beverages, or desserts to customers in settings such as restaurants or lunchrooms.
Prepare food items such as sandwiches, salads, or desserts, using proper safety precautions and sanitary measures.
Check and maintain adequate supplies of clean linens, silverware, glassware, and condiments.
Take customer orders, convey them for preparation, and wrap items for serving or takeout.
Clean and sanitize tables, equipment, and service areas to keep facilities sanitary.
Monitor and replenish food and supplies at serving stations to maintain inventory.
Check temperatures of freezers, refrigerators, or heating equipment to ensure proper functioning.
Greet customers and provide information about facilities, entertainment options, and rules and regulations.
Sell tickets and collect fees from customers, and verify, collect, or punch tickets before admitting patrons to venues.
Maintain inventories of equipment, store and retrieve items, and assemble and disassemble equipment as necessary.
Monitor patrons' facility use to ensure that rules and regulations are followed, and safety and order are maintained.
Assist patrons in finding seats and helping them with special needs, such as those with wheelchairs or dismounting from rides.
Provide towels and sheets to clients in public baths, steam rooms, and restrooms while also cleaning facilities such as floors or locker rooms.
Serve refreshments to customers, including selling and operating refreshment stands during intermissions or events.
Direct patrons to rides, seats, or attractions, and keep informed of shut-down and emergency evacuation procedures.
Perform maintenance and minor repairs on equipment, and inspect to detect wear and damage as necessary.
Count and record details of attendance, sales, receipts, bookings, or repair activities.
